meaning: n.窜漏(指气缸和活塞之间运动时流体的渗漏)adj.烧除废气防污染装置的
examples: Blowby is basically the leakage of compressed air-fuel mixture and burned gases past the piston rings into the crankase.
In fact, there had been evidence of leakage, what the engineers called "blowby, " on an earlier shuttle flight.
The engineers had resisted the launch, had recommended against it, citing the "blowby" in an earlier low-temperature launch and studies of the elasticity of the o-rings.
